1881      spec['msvs_external_builder'] = 'ninja' 
1882      if not spec.get('msvs_external_builder_out_dir'): 
1883        gyp_file, _, _ = gyp.common.ParseQualifiedTarget(qualified_target) 
1884        gyp_dir = os.path.dirname(gyp_file) 
1885        configuration = '$(Configuration)' 
1886        if params.get('target_arch') == 'x64': 
1887          configuration += '_x64' 
1888        spec['msvs_external_builder_out_dir'] = os.path.join( 
1889            gyp.common.RelativePath(params['options'].toplevel_dir, gyp_dir), 
1890            ninja_generator.ComputeOutputDir(params), 
1891            configuration) 
1892      if not spec.get('msvs_external_builder_build_cmd'): 
1893        spec['msvs_external_builder_build_cmd'] = [ 
1894          path_to_ninja, 
1895          '-C', 
1896          '$(OutDir)', 
1897          '$(ProjectName)', 
1898        ] 
1899      if not spec.get('msvs_external_builder_clean_cmd'): 
1900        spec['msvs_external_builder_clean_cmd'] = [ 
1901          path_to_ninja, 
1902          '-C', 
1903          '$(OutDir)', 
1904          '-tclean', 
1905          '$(ProjectName)', 
1906        ] 

1907   
1908   

1909 -def CalculateVariables(default_variables, params): 

1910    """Generated variables that require params to be known.""" 
1911   
1912    generator_flags = params.get('generator_flags', {}) 
1913   
1914    # Select project file format version (if unset, default to auto detecting). 
1915    msvs_version = MSVSVersion.SelectVisualStudioVersion( 
1916        generator_flags.get('msvs_version', 'auto')) 
1917    # Stash msvs_version for later (so we don't have to probe the system twice). 
1918    params['msvs_version'] = msvs_version 
1919   
1920    # Set a variable so conditions can be based on msvs_version. 
1921    default_variables['MSVS_VERSION'] = msvs_version.ShortName() 
1922   
1923    # To determine processor word size on Windows, in addition to checking 
1924    # PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE (which reflects the word size of the current 
1925    # process), it is also necessary to check PROCESSOR_ARCITEW6432 (which 
1926    # contains the actual word size of the system when running thru WOW64). 
1927    if (os.environ.get('PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE', '').find('64') >= 0 or 
1928        os.environ.get('PROCESSOR_ARCHITEW6432', '').find('64') >= 0): 
1929      default_variables['MSVS_OS_BITS'] = 64 
1930    else: 
1931      default_variables['MSVS_OS_BITS'] = 32 
1932   
1933    if gyp.common.GetFlavor(params) == 'ninja': 
1934      default_variables['SHARED_INTERMEDIATE_DIR'] = '$(OutDir)gen' 

1935   
1936   

1937 -def PerformBuild(data, configurations, params): 

1938    options = params['options'] 
1939    msvs_version = params['msvs_version'] 
1940    devenv = os.path.join(msvs_version.path, 'Common7', 'IDE', 'devenv.com') 
1941   
1942    for build_file, build_file_dict in data.iteritems(): 
1943      (build_file_root, build_file_ext) = os.path.splitext(build_file) 
1944      if build_file_ext != '.gyp': 
1945        continue 
1946      sln_path = build_file_root + options.suffix + '.sln' 
1947      if options.generator_output: 
1948        sln_path = os.path.join(options.generator_output, sln_path) 
1949   
1950    for config in configurations: 
1951      arguments = [devenv, sln_path, '/Build', config] 
1952      print 'Building [%s]: %s' % (config, arguments) 
1953      rtn = subprocess.check_call(arguments) 

1954   
1955   

1956 -def GenerateOutput(target_list, target_dicts, data, params): 

1957    """Generate .sln and .vcproj files. 
1958   
1959    This is the entry point for this generator. 
1960    Arguments: 
1961      target_list: List of target pairs: 'base/base.gyp:base'. 
1962      target_dicts: Dict of target properties keyed on target pair. 
1963      data: Dictionary containing per .gyp data. 
1964    """ 
1965    global fixpath_prefix 
1966   
1967    options = params['options'] 
1968   
1969    # Get the project file format version back out of where we stashed it in 
1970    # GeneratorCalculatedVariables. 
1971    msvs_version = params['msvs_version'] 
1972   
1973    generator_flags = params.get('generator_flags', {}) 
1974   
1975    # Optionally shard targets marked with 'msvs_shard': SHARD_COUNT. 
1976    (target_list, target_dicts) = MSVSUtil.ShardTargets(target_list, target_dicts) 
1977   
1978    # Optionally use the large PDB workaround for targets marked with 
1979    # 'msvs_large_pdb': 1. 
1980    (target_list, target_dicts) = MSVSUtil.InsertLargePdbShims( 
1981          target_list, target_dicts, generator_default_variables) 
1982   
1983    # Optionally configure each spec to use ninja as the external builder. 
1984    if params.get('flavor') == 'ninja': 
1985      _InitNinjaFlavor(params, target_list, target_dicts) 
1986   
1987    # Prepare the set of configurations. 
1988    configs = set() 
1989    for qualified_target in target_list: 
1990      spec = target_dicts[qualified_target] 
1991      for config_name, config in spec['configurations'].iteritems(): 
1992        configs.add(_ConfigFullName(config_name, config)) 
1993    configs = list(configs) 
1994   
1995    # Figure out all the projects that will be generated and their guids 
1996    project_objects = _CreateProjectObjects(target_list, target_dicts, options, 
1997                                            msvs_version) 
1998   
1999    # Generate each project. 
2000    missing_sources = [] 
2001    for project in project_objects.values(): 
2002      fixpath_prefix = project.fixpath_prefix 
2003      missing_sources.extend(_GenerateProject(project, options, msvs_version, 
2004                                              generator_flags)) 
2005    fixpath_prefix = None 
2006   
2007    for build_file in data: 
2008      # Validate build_file extension 
2009      if not build_file.endswith('.gyp'): 
2010        continue 
2011      sln_path = os.path.splitext(build_file)[0] + options.suffix + '.sln' 
2012      if options.generator_output: 
2013        sln_path = os.path.join(options.generator_output, sln_path) 
2014      # Get projects in the solution, and their dependents. 
2015      sln_projects = gyp.common.BuildFileTargets(target_list, build_file) 
2016      sln_projects += gyp.common.DeepDependencyTargets(target_dicts, sln_projects) 
2017      # Create folder hierarchy. 
2018      root_entries = _GatherSolutionFolders( 
2019          sln_projects, project_objects, flat=msvs_version.FlatSolution()) 
2020      # Create solution. 
2021      sln = MSVSNew.MSVSSolution(sln_path, 
2022                                 entries=root_entries, 
2023                                 variants=configs, 
2024                                 websiteProperties=False, 
2025                                 version=msvs_version) 
2026      sln.Write() 
2027   
2028    if missing_sources: 
2029      error_message = "Missing input files:\n" + \ 
2030                      '\n'.join(set(missing_sources)) 
2031      if generator_flags.get('msvs_error_on_missing_sources', False): 
2032        raise GypError(error_message) 
2033      else: 
2034        print >> sys.stdout, "Warning: " + error_message 

2035   
2036   

2037 -def _GenerateMSBuildFiltersFile(filters_path, source_files, 
2038                                  rule_dependencies, extension_to_rule_name): 

2039    """Generate the filters file. 
2040   
2041    This file is used by Visual Studio to organize the presentation of source 
2042    files into folders. 
2043   
2044    Arguments: 
2045        filters_path: The path of the file to be created. 
2046        source_files: The hierarchical structure of all the sources. 
2047        extension_to_rule_name: A dictionary mapping file extensions to rules. 
2048    """ 
2049    filter_group = [] 
2050    source_group = [] 
2051    _AppendFiltersForMSBuild('', source_files, rule_dependencies, 
2052                             extension_to_rule_name, filter_group, source_group) 
2053    if filter_group: 
2054      content = ['Project', 
2055                 {'ToolsVersion': '4.0', 
2056                  'xmlns': 'http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003' 
2057                 }, 
2058                 ['ItemGroup'] + filter_group, 
2059                 ['ItemGroup'] + source_group 
2060                ] 
2061      easy_xml.WriteXmlIfChanged(content, filters_path, pretty=True, win32=True) 
2062    elif os.path.exists(filters_path): 
2063      # We don't need this filter anymore.  Delete the old filter file. 
2064      os.unlink(filters_path) 

2065   
2066   

2067 -def _AppendFiltersForMSBuild(parent_filter_name, sources, rule_dependencies, 
2068                               extension_to_rule_name, 
2069                               filter_group, source_group): 

2070    """Creates the list of filters and sources to be added in the filter file. 
2071   
2072    Args: 
2073        parent_filter_name: The name of the filter under which the sources are 
2074            found. 
2075        sources: The hierarchy of filters and sources to process. 
2076        extension_to_rule_name: A dictionary mapping file extensions to rules. 
2077        filter_group: The list to which filter entries will be appended. 
2078        source_group: The list to which source entries will be appeneded. 
2079    """ 
2080    for source in sources: 
2081      if isinstance(source, MSVSProject.Filter): 
2082        # We have a sub-filter.  Create the name of that sub-filter. 
2083        if not parent_filter_name: 
2084          filter_name = source.name 
2085        else: 
2086          filter_name = '%s\\%s' % (parent_filter_name, source.name) 
2087        # Add the filter to the group. 
2088        filter_group.append( 
2089            ['Filter', {'Include': filter_name}, 
2090             ['UniqueIdentifier', MSVSNew.MakeGuid(source.name)]]) 
2091        # Recurse and add its dependents. 
2092        _AppendFiltersForMSBuild(filter_name, source.contents, 
2093                                 rule_dependencies, extension_to_rule_name, 
2094                                 filter_group, source_group) 
2095      else: 
2096        # It's a source.  Create a source entry. 
2097        _, element = _MapFileToMsBuildSourceType(source, rule_dependencies, 
2098                                                 extension_to_rule_name) 
2099        source_entry = [element, {'Include': source}] 
2100        # Specify the filter it is part of, if any. 
2101        if parent_filter_name: 
2102          source_entry.append(['Filter', parent_filter_name]) 
2103        source_group.append(source_entry) 

2104   
2105   

2106 -def _MapFileToMsBuildSourceType(source, rule_dependencies, 
2107                                  extension_to_rule_name): 

2108    """Returns the group and element type of the source file. 
2109   
2110    Arguments: 
2111        source: The source file name. 
2112        extension_to_rule_name: A dictionary mapping file extensions to rules. 
2113   
2114    Returns: 
2115        A pair of (group this file should be part of, the label of element) 
2116    """ 
2117    _, ext = os.path.splitext(source) 
2118    if ext in extension_to_rule_name: 
2119      group = 'rule' 
2120      element = extension_to_rule_name[ext] 
2121    elif ext in ['.cc', '.cpp', '.c', '.cxx', '.mm']: 
2122      group = 'compile' 
2123      element = 'ClCompile' 
2124    elif ext in ['.h', '.hxx']: 
2125      group = 'include' 
2126      element = 'ClInclude' 
2127    elif ext == '.rc': 
2128      group = 'resource' 
2129      element = 'ResourceCompile' 
2130    elif ext == '.asm': 
2131      group = 'masm' 
2132      element = 'MASM' 
2133    elif ext == '.idl': 
2134      group = 'midl' 
2135      element = 'Midl' 
2136    elif source in rule_dependencies: 
2137      group = 'rule_dependency' 
2138      element = 'CustomBuild' 
2139    else: 
2140      group = 'none' 
2141      element = 'None' 
2142    return (group, element) 

2143   
2144   

2145 -def _GenerateRulesForMSBuild(output_dir, options, spec, 
2146                               sources, excluded_sources, 
2147                               props_files_of_rules, targets_files_of_rules, 
2148                               actions_to_add, rule_dependencies, 
2149                               extension_to_rule_name): 

2150    # MSBuild rules are implemented using three files: an XML file, a .targets 
2151    # file and a .props file. 
2152    # See http://blogs.msdn.com/b/vcblog/archive/2010/04/21/quick-help-on-vs2010-custom-build-rule.aspx 
2153    # for more details. 
2154    rules = spec.get('rules', []) 
2155    rules_native = [r for r in rules if not int(r.get('msvs_external_rule', 0))] 
2156    rules_external = [r for r in rules if int(r.get('msvs_external_rule', 0))] 
2157   
2158    msbuild_rules = [] 
2159    for rule in rules_native: 
2160      # Skip a rule with no action and no inputs. 
2161      if 'action' not in rule and not rule.get('rule_sources', []): 
2162        continue 
2163      msbuild_rule = MSBuildRule(rule, spec) 
2164      msbuild_rules.append(msbuild_rule) 
2165      rule_dependencies.update(msbuild_rule.additional_dependencies.split(';')) 
2166      extension_to_rule_name[msbuild_rule.extension] = msbuild_rule.rule_name 
2167    if msbuild_rules: 
2168      base = spec['target_name'] + options.suffix 
2169      props_name = base + '.props' 
2170      targets_name = base + '.targets' 
2171      xml_name = base + '.xml' 
2172   
2173      props_files_of_rules.add(props_name) 
2174      targets_files_of_rules.add(targets_name) 
2175   
2176      props_path = os.path.join(output_dir, props_name) 
2177      targets_path = os.path.join(output_dir, targets_name) 
2178      xml_path = os.path.join(output_dir, xml_name) 
2179   
2180      _GenerateMSBuildRulePropsFile(props_path, msbuild_rules) 
2181      _GenerateMSBuildRuleTargetsFile(targets_path, msbuild_rules) 
2182      _GenerateMSBuildRuleXmlFile(xml_path, msbuild_rules) 
2183   
2184    if rules_external: 
2185      _GenerateExternalRules(rules_external, output_dir, spec, 
2186                             sources, options, actions_to_add) 
2187    _AdjustSourcesForRules(rules, sources, excluded_sources, True) 

2188   
2189   

2190 -class MSBuildRule(object): 

2191    """Used to store information used to generate an MSBuild rule. 
2192   
2193    Attributes: 
2194      rule_name: The rule name, sanitized to use in XML. 
2195      target_name: The name of the target. 
2196      after_targets: The name of the AfterTargets element. 
2197      before_targets: The name of the BeforeTargets element. 
2198      depends_on: The name of the DependsOn element. 
2199      compute_output: The name of the ComputeOutput element. 
2200      dirs_to_make: The name of the DirsToMake element. 
2201      inputs: The name of the _inputs element. 
2202      tlog: The name of the _tlog element. 
2203      extension: The extension this rule applies to. 
2204      description: The message displayed when this rule is invoked. 
2205      additional_dependencies: A string listing additional dependencies. 
2206      outputs: The outputs of this rule. 
2207      command: The command used to run the rule. 
2208    """ 
2209   

2210 -  def __init__(self, rule, spec): 

2211      self.display_name = rule['rule_name'] 
2212      # Assure that the rule name is only characters and numbers 
2213      self.rule_name = re.sub(r'\W', '_', self.display_name) 
2214      # Create the various element names, following the example set by the 
2215      # Visual Studio 2008 to 2010 conversion.  I don't know if VS2010 
2216      # is sensitive to the exact names. 
2217      self.target_name = '_' + self.rule_name 
2218      self.after_targets = self.rule_name + 'AfterTargets' 
2219      self.before_targets = self.rule_name + 'BeforeTargets' 
2220      self.depends_on = self.rule_name + 'DependsOn' 
2221      self.compute_output = 'Compute%sOutput' % self.rule_name 
2222      self.dirs_to_make = self.rule_name + 'DirsToMake' 
2223      self.inputs = self.rule_name + '_inputs' 
2224      self.tlog = self.rule_name + '_tlog' 
2225      self.extension = rule['extension'] 
2226      if not self.extension.startswith('.'): 
2227        self.extension = '.' + self.extension 
2228   
2229      self.description = MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild( 
2230          rule.get('message', self.rule_name)) 
2231      old_additional_dependencies = _FixPaths(rule.get('inputs', [])) 
2232      self.additional_dependencies = ( 
2233          ';'.join([MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(i) 
2234                    for i in old_additional_dependencies])) 
2235      old_outputs = _FixPaths(rule.get('outputs', [])) 
2236      self.outputs = ';'.join([MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(i) 
2237                               for i in old_outputs]) 
2238      old_command = _BuildCommandLineForRule(spec, rule, has_input_path=True, 
2239                                             do_setup_env=True) 
2240      self.command = MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(old_command) 

2241   
2242   

2243 -def _GenerateMSBuildRulePropsFile(props_path, msbuild_rules): 

2244    """Generate the .props file.""" 
2245    content = ['Project', 
2246               {'xmlns': 'http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003'}] 
2247    for rule in msbuild_rules: 
2248      content.extend([ 
2249          ['PropertyGroup', 
2250           {'Condition': "'$(%s)' == '' and '$(%s)' == '' and " 
2251            "'$(ConfigurationType)' != 'Makefile'" % (rule.before_targets, 
2252                                                      rule.after_targets) 
2253           }, 
2254           [rule.before_targets, 'Midl'], 
2255           [rule.after_targets, 'CustomBuild'], 
2256          ], 
2257          ['PropertyGroup', 
2258           [rule.depends_on, 
2259            {'Condition': "'$(ConfigurationType)' != 'Makefile'"}, 
2260            '_SelectedFiles;$(%s)' % rule.depends_on 
2261           ], 
2262          ], 
2263          ['ItemDefinitionGroup', 
2264           [rule.rule_name, 
2265            ['CommandLineTemplate', rule.command], 
2266            ['Outputs', rule.outputs], 
2267            ['ExecutionDescription', rule.description], 
2268            ['AdditionalDependencies', rule.additional_dependencies], 
2269           ], 
2270          ] 
2271      ]) 
2272    easy_xml.WriteXmlIfChanged(content, props_path, pretty=True, win32=True) 

2273   
2274   

2275 -def _GenerateMSBuildRuleTargetsFile(targets_path, msbuild_rules): 

2276    """Generate the .targets file.""" 
2277    content = ['Project', 
2278               {'xmlns': 'http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003' 
2279               } 
2280              ] 
2281    item_group = [ 
2282        'ItemGroup', 
2283        ['PropertyPageSchema', 
2284         {'Include': '$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)$(MSBuildThisFileName).xml'} 
2285        ] 
2286      ] 
2287    for rule in msbuild_rules: 
2288      item_group.append( 
2289          ['AvailableItemName', 
2290           {'Include': rule.rule_name}, 
2291           ['Targets', rule.target_name], 
2292          ]) 
2293    content.append(item_group) 
2294   
2295    for rule in msbuild_rules: 
2296      content.append( 
2297          ['UsingTask', 
2298           {'TaskName': rule.rule_name, 
2299            'TaskFactory': 'XamlTaskFactory', 
2300            'AssemblyName': 'Microsoft.Build.Tasks.v4.0' 
2301           }, 
2302           ['Task', '$(MSBuildThisFileDirectory)$(MSBuildThisFileName).xml'], 
2303          ]) 
2304    for rule in msbuild_rules: 
2305      rule_name = rule.rule_name 
2306      target_outputs = '%%(%s.Outputs)' % rule_name 
2307      target_inputs = ('%%(%s.Identity);%%(%s.AdditionalDependencies);' 
2308                       '$(MSBuildProjectFile)') % (rule_name, rule_name) 
2309      rule_inputs = '%%(%s.Identity)' % rule_name 
2310      extension_condition = ("'%(Extension)'=='.obj' or " 
2311                             "'%(Extension)'=='.res' or " 
2312                             "'%(Extension)'=='.rsc' or " 
2313                             "'%(Extension)'=='.lib'") 
2314      remove_section = [ 
2315          'ItemGroup', 
2316          {'Condition': "'@(SelectedFiles)' != ''"}, 
2317          [rule_name, 
2318           {'Remove': '@(%s)' % rule_name, 
2319            'Condition': "'%(Identity)' != '@(SelectedFiles)'" 
2320           } 
2321          ] 
2322      ] 
2323      inputs_section = [ 
2324          'ItemGroup', 
2325          [rule.inputs, {'Include': '%%(%s.AdditionalDependencies)' % rule_name}] 
2326      ] 
2327      logging_section = [ 
2328          'ItemGroup', 
2329          [rule.tlog, 
2330           {'Include': '%%(%s.Outputs)' % rule_name, 
2331            'Condition': ("'%%(%s.Outputs)' != '' and " 
2332                          "'%%(%s.ExcludedFromBuild)' != 'true'" % 
2333                          (rule_name, rule_name)) 
2334           }, 
2335           ['Source', "@(%s, '|')" % rule_name], 
2336           ['Inputs', "@(%s -> '%%(Fullpath)', ';')" % rule.inputs], 
2337          ], 
2338      ] 
2339      message_section = [ 
2340          'Message', 
2341          {'Importance': 'High', 
2342           'Text': '%%(%s.ExecutionDescription)' % rule_name 
2343          } 
2344      ] 
2345      write_tlog_section = [ 
2346          'WriteLinesToFile', 
2347          {'Condition': "'@(%s)' != '' and '%%(%s.ExcludedFromBuild)' != " 
2348           "'true'" % (rule.tlog, rule.tlog), 
2349           'File': '$(IntDir)$(ProjectName).write.1.tlog', 
2350           'Lines': "^%%(%s.Source);@(%s->'%%(Fullpath)')" % (rule.tlog, 
2351                                                              rule.tlog) 
2352          } 
2353      ] 
2354      read_tlog_section = [ 
2355          'WriteLinesToFile', 
2356          {'Condition': "'@(%s)' != '' and '%%(%s.ExcludedFromBuild)' != " 
2357           "'true'" % (rule.tlog, rule.tlog), 
2358           'File': '$(IntDir)$(ProjectName).read.1.tlog', 
2359           'Lines': "^%%(%s.Source);%%(%s.Inputs)" % (rule.tlog, rule.tlog) 
2360          } 
2361      ] 
2362      command_and_input_section = [ 
2363          rule_name, 
2364          {'Condition': "'@(%s)' != '' and '%%(%s.ExcludedFromBuild)' != " 
2365           "'true'" % (rule_name, rule_name), 
2366           'EchoOff': 'true', 
2367           'StandardOutputImportance': 'High', 
2368           'StandardErrorImportance': 'High', 
2369           'CommandLineTemplate': '%%(%s.CommandLineTemplate)' % rule_name, 
2370           'AdditionalOptions': '%%(%s.AdditionalOptions)' % rule_name, 
2371           'Inputs': rule_inputs 
2372          } 
2373      ] 
2374      content.extend([ 
2375          ['Target', 
2376           {'Name': rule.target_name, 
2377            'BeforeTargets': '$(%s)' % rule.before_targets, 
2378            'AfterTargets': '$(%s)' % rule.after_targets, 
2379            'Condition': "'@(%s)' != ''" % rule_name, 
2380            'DependsOnTargets': '$(%s);%s' % (rule.depends_on, 
2381                                              rule.compute_output), 
2382            'Outputs': target_outputs, 
2383            'Inputs': target_inputs 
2384           }, 
2385           remove_section, 
2386           inputs_section, 
2387           logging_section, 
2388           message_section, 
2389           write_tlog_section, 
2390           read_tlog_section, 
2391           command_and_input_section, 
2392          ], 
2393          ['PropertyGroup', 
2394           ['ComputeLinkInputsTargets', 
2395            '$(ComputeLinkInputsTargets);', 
2396            '%s;' % rule.compute_output 
2397           ], 
2398           ['ComputeLibInputsTargets', 
2399            '$(ComputeLibInputsTargets);', 
2400            '%s;' % rule.compute_output 
2401           ], 
2402          ], 
2403          ['Target', 
2404           {'Name': rule.compute_output, 
2405            'Condition': "'@(%s)' != ''" % rule_name 
2406           }, 
2407           ['ItemGroup', 
2408            [rule.dirs_to_make, 
2409             {'Condition': "'@(%s)' != '' and " 
2410              "'%%(%s.ExcludedFromBuild)' != 'true'" % (rule_name, rule_name), 
2411              'Include': '%%(%s.Outputs)' % rule_name 
2412             } 
2413            ], 
2414            ['Link', 
2415             {'Include': '%%(%s.Identity)' % rule.dirs_to_make, 
2416              'Condition': extension_condition 
2417             } 
2418            ], 
2419            ['Lib', 
2420             {'Include': '%%(%s.Identity)' % rule.dirs_to_make, 
2421              'Condition': extension_condition 
2422             } 
2423            ], 
2424            ['ImpLib', 
2425             {'Include': '%%(%s.Identity)' % rule.dirs_to_make, 
2426              'Condition': extension_condition 
2427             } 
2428            ], 
2429           ], 
2430           ['MakeDir', 
2431            {'Directories': ("@(%s->'%%(RootDir)%%(Directory)')" % 
2432                             rule.dirs_to_make) 
2433            } 
2434           ] 
2435          ], 
2436      ]) 
2437    easy_xml.WriteXmlIfChanged(content, targets_path, pretty=True, win32=True) 

2438   
2439   

2440 -def _GenerateMSBuildRuleXmlFile(xml_path, msbuild_rules): 

2441    # Generate the .xml file 
2442    content = [ 
2443        'ProjectSchemaDefinitions', 
2444        {'xmlns': ('clr-namespace:Microsoft.Build.Framework.XamlTypes;' 
2445                   'assembly=Microsoft.Build.Framework'), 
2446         'xmlns:x': 'http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml', 
2447         'xmlns:sys': 'clr-namespace:System;assembly=mscorlib', 
2448         'xmlns:transformCallback': 
2449         'Microsoft.Cpp.Dev10.ConvertPropertyCallback' 
2450        } 
2451    ] 
2452    for rule in msbuild_rules: 
2453      content.extend([ 
2454          ['Rule', 
2455           {'Name': rule.rule_name, 
2456            'PageTemplate': 'tool', 
2457            'DisplayName': rule.display_name, 
2458            'Order': '200' 
2459           }, 
2460           ['Rule.DataSource', 
2461            ['DataSource', 
2462             {'Persistence': 'ProjectFile', 
2463              'ItemType': rule.rule_name 
2464             } 
2465            ] 
2466           ], 
2467           ['Rule.Categories', 
2468            ['Category', 
2469             {'Name': 'General'}, 
2470             ['Category.DisplayName', 
2471              ['sys:String', 'General'], 
2472             ], 
2473            ], 
2474            ['Category', 
2475             {'Name': 'Command Line', 
2476              'Subtype': 'CommandLine' 
2477             }, 
2478             ['Category.DisplayName', 
2479              ['sys:String', 'Command Line'], 
2480             ], 
2481            ], 
2482           ], 
2483           ['StringListProperty', 
2484            {'Name': 'Inputs', 
2485             'Category': 'Command Line', 
2486             'IsRequired': 'true', 
2487             'Switch': ' ' 
2488            }, 
2489            ['StringListProperty.DataSource', 
2490             ['DataSource', 
2491              {'Persistence': 'ProjectFile', 
2492               'ItemType': rule.rule_name, 
2493               'SourceType': 'Item' 
2494              } 
2495             ] 
2496            ], 
2497           ], 
2498           ['StringProperty', 
2499            {'Name': 'CommandLineTemplate', 
2500             'DisplayName': 'Command Line', 
2501             'Visible': 'False', 
2502             'IncludeInCommandLine': 'False' 
2503            } 
2504           ], 
2505           ['DynamicEnumProperty', 
2506            {'Name': rule.before_targets, 
2507             'Category': 'General', 
2508             'EnumProvider': 'Targets', 
2509             'IncludeInCommandLine': 'False' 
2510            }, 
2511            ['DynamicEnumProperty.DisplayName', 
2512             ['sys:String', 'Execute Before'], 
2513            ], 
2514            ['DynamicEnumProperty.Description', 
2515             ['sys:String', 'Specifies the targets for the build customization' 
2516              ' to run before.' 
2517             ], 
2518            ], 
2519            ['DynamicEnumProperty.ProviderSettings', 
2520             ['NameValuePair', 
2521              {'Name': 'Exclude', 
2522               'Value': '^%s|^Compute' % rule.before_targets 
2523              } 
2524             ] 
2525            ], 
2526            ['DynamicEnumProperty.DataSource', 
2527             ['DataSource', 
2528              {'Persistence': 'ProjectFile', 
2529               'HasConfigurationCondition': 'true' 
2530              } 
2531             ] 
2532            ], 
2533           ], 
2534           ['DynamicEnumProperty', 
2535            {'Name': rule.after_targets, 
2536             'Category': 'General', 
2537             'EnumProvider': 'Targets', 
2538             'IncludeInCommandLine': 'False' 
2539            }, 
2540            ['DynamicEnumProperty.DisplayName', 
2541             ['sys:String', 'Execute After'], 
2542            ], 
2543            ['DynamicEnumProperty.Description', 
2544             ['sys:String', ('Specifies the targets for the build customization' 
2545                             ' to run after.') 
2546             ], 
2547            ], 
2548            ['DynamicEnumProperty.ProviderSettings', 
2549             ['NameValuePair', 
2550              {'Name': 'Exclude', 
2551               'Value': '^%s|^Compute' % rule.after_targets 
2552              } 
2553             ] 
2554            ], 
2555            ['DynamicEnumProperty.DataSource', 
2556             ['DataSource', 
2557              {'Persistence': 'ProjectFile', 
2558               'ItemType': '', 
2559               'HasConfigurationCondition': 'true' 
2560              } 
2561             ] 
2562            ], 
2563           ], 
2564           ['StringListProperty', 
2565            {'Name': 'Outputs', 
2566             'DisplayName': 'Outputs', 
2567             'Visible': 'False', 
2568             'IncludeInCommandLine': 'False' 
2569            } 
2570           ], 
2571           ['StringProperty', 
2572            {'Name': 'ExecutionDescription', 
2573             'DisplayName': 'Execution Description', 
2574             'Visible': 'False', 
2575             'IncludeInCommandLine': 'False' 
2576            } 
2577           ], 
2578           ['StringListProperty', 
2579            {'Name': 'AdditionalDependencies', 
2580             'DisplayName': 'Additional Dependencies', 
2581             'IncludeInCommandLine': 'False', 
2582             'Visible': 'false' 
2583            } 
2584           ], 
2585           ['StringProperty', 
2586            {'Subtype': 'AdditionalOptions', 
2587             'Name': 'AdditionalOptions', 
2588             'Category': 'Command Line' 
2589            }, 
2590            ['StringProperty.DisplayName', 
2591             ['sys:String', 'Additional Options'], 
2592            ], 
2593            ['StringProperty.Description', 
2594             ['sys:String', 'Additional Options'], 
2595            ], 
2596           ], 
2597          ], 
2598          ['ItemType', 
2599           {'Name': rule.rule_name, 
2600            'DisplayName': rule.display_name 
2601           } 
2602          ], 
2603          ['FileExtension', 
2604           {'Name': '*' + rule.extension, 
2605            'ContentType': rule.rule_name 
2606           } 
2607          ], 
2608          ['ContentType', 
2609           {'Name': rule.rule_name, 
2610            'DisplayName': '', 
2611            'ItemType': rule.rule_name 
2612           } 
2613          ] 
2614      ]) 
2615    easy_xml.WriteXmlIfChanged(content, xml_path, pretty=True, win32=True)

2618 -def _GetConfigurationAndPlatform(name, settings): 

2619    configuration = name.rsplit('_', 1)[0] 
2620    platform = settings.get('msvs_configuration_platform', 'Win32') 
2621    return (configuration, platform) 

2622   
2623   

2624 -def _GetConfigurationCondition(name, settings): 

2625    return (r"'$(Configuration)|$(Platform)'=='%s|%s'" % 
2626            _GetConfigurationAndPlatform(name, settings)) 

2627   
2628   

2629 -def _GetMSBuildProjectConfigurations(configurations): 

2630    group = ['ItemGroup', {'Label': 'ProjectConfigurations'}] 
2631    for (name, settings) in sorted(configurations.iteritems()): 
2632      configuration, platform = _GetConfigurationAndPlatform(name, settings) 
2633      designation = '%s|%s' % (configuration, platform) 
2634      group.append( 
2635          ['ProjectConfiguration', {'Include': designation}, 
2636           ['Configuration', configuration], 
2637           ['Platform', platform]]) 
2638    return [group] 

2639   
2640   

2641 -def _GetMSBuildGlobalProperties(spec, guid, gyp_file_name): 

2642    namespace = os.path.splitext(gyp_file_name)[0] 
2643    properties = [ 
2644        ['PropertyGroup', {'Label': 'Globals'}, 
2645          ['ProjectGuid', guid], 
2646          ['Keyword', 'Win32Proj'], 
2647          ['RootNamespace', namespace], 
2648          ['IgnoreWarnCompileDuplicatedFilename', 'true'], 
2649        ] 
2650      ] 
2651   
2652    if os.environ.get('PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE') == 'AMD64' or \ 
2653       os.environ.get('PROCESSOR_ARCHITEW6432') == 'AMD64': 
2654      properties[0].append(['PreferredToolArchitecture', 'x64']) 
2655   
2656    if spec.get('msvs_enable_winrt'): 
2657      properties[0].append(['DefaultLanguage', 'en-US']) 
2658      properties[0].append(['AppContainerApplication', 'true']) 
2659      if spec.get('msvs_application_type_revision'): 
2660        app_type_revision = spec.get('msvs_application_type_revision') 
2661        properties[0].append(['ApplicationTypeRevision', app_type_revision]) 
2662      else: 
2663        properties[0].append(['ApplicationTypeRevision', '8.1']) 
2664   
2665      if spec.get('msvs_target_platform_version'): 
2666        target_platform_version = spec.get('msvs_target_platform_version') 
2667        properties[0].append(['WindowsTargetPlatformVersion', 
2668                              target_platform_version]) 
2669        if spec.get('msvs_target_platform_minversion'): 
2670          target_platform_minversion = spec.get('msvs_target_platform_minversion') 
2671          properties[0].append(['WindowsTargetPlatformMinVersion', 
2672                                target_platform_minversion]) 
2673        else: 
2674          properties[0].append(['WindowsTargetPlatformMinVersion', 
2675                                target_platform_version]) 
2676      if spec.get('msvs_enable_winphone'): 
2677        properties[0].append(['ApplicationType', 'Windows Phone']) 
2678      else: 
2679        properties[0].append(['ApplicationType', 'Windows Store']) 
2680   
2681    platform_name = None 
2682    msvs_windows_target_platform_version = None 
2683    for configuration in spec['configurations'].itervalues(): 
2684      platform_name = platform_name or _ConfigPlatform(configuration) 
2685      msvs_windows_target_platform_version = \ 
2686                      msvs_windows_target_platform_version or \ 
2687                      _ConfigWindowsTargetPlatformVersion(configuration) 
2688      if platform_name and msvs_windows_target_platform_version: 
2689        break 
2690   
2691    if platform_name == 'ARM': 
2692      properties[0].append(['WindowsSDKDesktopARMSupport', 'true']) 
2693    if msvs_windows_target_platform_version: 
2694      properties[0].append(['WindowsTargetPlatformVersion', \ 
2695                            str(msvs_windows_target_platform_version)]) 
2696   
2697    return properties 

2698   

2699 -def _GetMSBuildConfigurationDetails(spec, build_file): 

2700    properties = {} 
2701    for name, settings in spec['configurations'].iteritems(): 
2702      msbuild_attributes = _GetMSBuildAttributes(spec, settings, build_file) 
2703      condition = _GetConfigurationCondition(name, settings) 
2704      character_set = msbuild_attributes.get('CharacterSet') 
2705      _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'ConfigurationType', 
2706                              msbuild_attributes['ConfigurationType']) 
2707      if character_set: 
2708        if 'msvs_enable_winrt' not in spec : 
2709          _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'CharacterSet', 
2710                                  character_set) 
2711    return _GetMSBuildPropertyGroup(spec, 'Configuration', properties) 

2712   
2713   

2714 -def _GetMSBuildLocalProperties(msbuild_toolset): 

2715    # Currently the only local property we support is PlatformToolset 
2716    properties = {} 
2717    if msbuild_toolset: 
2718      properties = [ 
2719          ['PropertyGroup', {'Label': 'Locals'}, 
2720            ['PlatformToolset', msbuild_toolset], 
2721          ] 
2722        ] 
2723    return properties 

2724   
2725   

2726 -def _GetMSBuildPropertySheets(configurations): 

2727    user_props = r'$(UserRootDir)\Microsoft.Cpp.$(Platform).user.props' 
2728    additional_props = {} 
2729    props_specified = False 
2730    for name, settings in sorted(configurations.iteritems()): 
2731      configuration = _GetConfigurationCondition(name, settings) 
2732      if settings.has_key('msbuild_props'): 
2733        additional_props[configuration] = _FixPaths(settings['msbuild_props']) 
2734        props_specified = True 
2735      else: 
2736       additional_props[configuration] = '' 
2737   
2738    if not props_specified: 
2739      return [ 
2740          ['ImportGroup', 
2741           {'Label': 'PropertySheets'}, 
2742           ['Import', 
2743            {'Project': user_props, 
2744             'Condition': "exists('%s')" % user_props, 
2745             'Label': 'LocalAppDataPlatform' 
2746            } 
2747           ] 
2748          ] 
2749      ] 
2750    else: 
2751      sheets = [] 
2752      for condition, props in additional_props.iteritems(): 
2753        import_group = [ 
2754          'ImportGroup', 
2755          {'Label': 'PropertySheets', 
2756           'Condition': condition 
2757          }, 
2758          ['Import', 
2759           {'Project': user_props, 
2760            'Condition': "exists('%s')" % user_props, 
2761            'Label': 'LocalAppDataPlatform' 
2762           } 
2763          ] 
2764        ] 
2765        for props_file in props: 
2766          import_group.append(['Import', {'Project':props_file}]) 
2767        sheets.append(import_group) 
2768      return sheets 

2769   

2770 -def _ConvertMSVSBuildAttributes(spec, config, build_file): 

2771    config_type = _GetMSVSConfigurationType(spec, build_file) 
2772    msvs_attributes = _GetMSVSAttributes(spec, config, config_type) 
2773    msbuild_attributes = {} 
2774    for a in msvs_attributes: 
2775      if a in ['IntermediateDirectory', 'OutputDirectory']: 
2776        directory = MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(msvs_attributes[a]) 
2777        if not directory.endswith('\\'): 
2778          directory += '\\' 
2779        msbuild_attributes[a] = directory 
2780      elif a == 'CharacterSet': 
2781        msbuild_attributes[a] = _ConvertMSVSCharacterSet(msvs_attributes[a]) 
2782      elif a == 'ConfigurationType': 
2783        msbuild_attributes[a] = _ConvertMSVSConfigurationType(msvs_attributes[a]) 
2784      else: 
2785        print 'Warning: Do not know how to convert MSVS attribute ' + a 
2786    return msbuild_attributes 

2787   
2788   

2789 -def _ConvertMSVSCharacterSet(char_set): 

2790    if char_set.isdigit(): 
2791      char_set = { 
2792          '0': 'MultiByte', 
2793          '1': 'Unicode', 
2794          '2': 'MultiByte', 
2795      }[char_set] 
2796    return char_set 

2797   
2798   

2799 -def _ConvertMSVSConfigurationType(config_type): 

2800    if config_type.isdigit(): 
2801      config_type = { 
2802          '1': 'Application', 
2803          '2': 'DynamicLibrary', 
2804          '4': 'StaticLibrary', 
2805          '10': 'Utility' 
2806      }[config_type] 
2807    return config_type 

2808   
2809   

2810 -def _GetMSBuildAttributes(spec, config, build_file): 

2811    if 'msbuild_configuration_attributes' not in config: 
2812      msbuild_attributes = _ConvertMSVSBuildAttributes(spec, config, build_file) 
2813   
2814    else: 
2815      config_type = _GetMSVSConfigurationType(spec, build_file) 
2816      config_type = _ConvertMSVSConfigurationType(config_type) 
2817      msbuild_attributes = config.get('msbuild_configuration_attributes', {}) 
2818      msbuild_attributes.setdefault('ConfigurationType', config_type) 
2819      output_dir = msbuild_attributes.get('OutputDirectory', 
2820                                        '$(SolutionDir)$(Configuration)') 
2821      msbuild_attributes['OutputDirectory'] = _FixPath(output_dir) + '\\' 
2822      if 'IntermediateDirectory' not in msbuild_attributes: 
2823        intermediate = _FixPath('$(Configuration)') + '\\' 
2824        msbuild_attributes['IntermediateDirectory'] = intermediate 
2825      if 'CharacterSet' in msbuild_attributes: 
2826        msbuild_attributes['CharacterSet'] = _ConvertMSVSCharacterSet( 
2827            msbuild_attributes['CharacterSet']) 
2828    if 'TargetName' not in msbuild_attributes: 
2829      prefix = spec.get('product_prefix', '') 
2830      product_name = spec.get('product_name', '$(ProjectName)') 
2831      target_name = prefix + product_name 
2832      msbuild_attributes['TargetName'] = target_name 
2833    if 'TargetExt' not in msbuild_attributes and 'product_extension' in spec: 
2834      ext = spec.get('product_extension') 
2835      msbuild_attributes['TargetExt'] = '.' + ext 
2836   
2837    if spec.get('msvs_external_builder'): 
2838      external_out_dir = spec.get('msvs_external_builder_out_dir', '.') 
2839      msbuild_attributes['OutputDirectory'] = _FixPath(external_out_dir) + '\\' 
2840   
2841    # Make sure that 'TargetPath' matches 'Lib.OutputFile' or 'Link.OutputFile' 
2842    # (depending on the tool used) to avoid MSB8012 warning. 
2843    msbuild_tool_map = { 
2844        'executable': 'Link', 
2845        'shared_library': 'Link', 
2846        'loadable_module': 'Link', 
2847        'static_library': 'Lib', 
2848    } 
2849    msbuild_tool = msbuild_tool_map.get(spec['type']) 
2850    if msbuild_tool: 
2851      msbuild_settings = config['finalized_msbuild_settings'] 
2852      out_file = msbuild_settings[msbuild_tool].get('OutputFile') 
2853      if out_file: 
2854        msbuild_attributes['TargetPath'] = _FixPath(out_file) 
2855      target_ext = msbuild_settings[msbuild_tool].get('TargetExt') 
2856      if target_ext: 
2857        msbuild_attributes['TargetExt'] = target_ext 
2858   
2859    return msbuild_attributes 

2860   
2861   

2862 -def _GetMSBuildConfigurationGlobalProperties(spec, configurations, build_file): 

2863    # TODO(jeanluc) We could optimize out the following and do it only if 
2864    # there are actions. 
2865    # TODO(jeanluc) Handle the equivalent of setting 'CYGWIN=nontsec'. 
2866    new_paths = [] 
2867    cygwin_dirs = spec.get('msvs_cygwin_dirs', ['.'])[0] 
2868    if cygwin_dirs: 
2869      cyg_path = '$(MSBuildProjectDirectory)\\%s\\bin\\' % _FixPath(cygwin_dirs) 
2870      new_paths.append(cyg_path) 
2871      # TODO(jeanluc) Change the convention to have both a cygwin_dir and a 
2872      # python_dir. 
2873      python_path = cyg_path.replace('cygwin\\bin', 'python_26') 
2874      new_paths.append(python_path) 
2875      if new_paths: 
2876        new_paths = '$(ExecutablePath);' + ';'.join(new_paths) 
2877   
2878    properties = {} 
2879    for (name, configuration) in sorted(configurations.iteritems()): 
2880      condition = _GetConfigurationCondition(name, configuration) 
2881      attributes = _GetMSBuildAttributes(spec, configuration, build_file) 
2882      msbuild_settings = configuration['finalized_msbuild_settings'] 
2883      _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'IntDir', 
2884                              attributes['IntermediateDirectory']) 
2885      _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'OutDir', 
2886                              attributes['OutputDirectory']) 
2887      _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'TargetName', 
2888                              attributes['TargetName']) 
2889      if 'TargetExt' in attributes: 
2890        _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'TargetExt', 
2891                                attributes['TargetExt']) 
2892   
2893      if attributes.get('TargetPath'): 
2894        _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'TargetPath', 
2895                                attributes['TargetPath']) 
2896      if attributes.get('TargetExt'): 
2897        _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'TargetExt', 
2898                                attributes['TargetExt']) 
2899   
2900      if new_paths: 
2901        _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, 'ExecutablePath', 
2902                                new_paths) 
2903      tool_settings = msbuild_settings.get('', {}) 
2904      for name, value in sorted(tool_settings.iteritems()): 
2905        formatted_value = _GetValueFormattedForMSBuild('', name, value) 
2906        _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, name, formatted_value) 
2907    return _GetMSBuildPropertyGroup(spec, None, properties) 

2908   
2909   

2910 -def _AddConditionalProperty(properties, condition, name, value): 

2911    """Adds a property / conditional value pair to a dictionary. 
2912   
2913    Arguments: 
2914      properties: The dictionary to be modified.  The key is the name of the 
2915          property.  The value is itself a dictionary; its key is the value and 
2916          the value a list of condition for which this value is true. 
2917      condition: The condition under which the named property has the value. 
2918      name: The name of the property. 
2919      value: The value of the property. 
2920    """ 
2921    if name not in properties: 
2922      properties[name] = {} 
2923    values = properties[name] 
2924    if value not in values: 
2925      values[value] = [] 
2926    conditions = values[value] 
2927    conditions.append(condition) 

2928   
2929   
2930  # Regex for msvs variable references ( i.e. $(FOO) ). 
2931  MSVS_VARIABLE_REFERENCE = re.compile(r'\$\(([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\)') 
2932   
2933   

2934 -def _GetMSBuildPropertyGroup(spec, label, properties): 

2935    """Returns a PropertyGroup definition for the specified properties. 
2936   
2937    Arguments: 
2938      spec: The target project dict. 
2939      label: An optional label for the PropertyGroup. 
2940      properties: The dictionary to be converted.  The key is the name of the 
2941          property.  The value is itself a dictionary; its key is the value and 
2942          the value a list of condition for which this value is true. 
2943    """ 
2944    group = ['PropertyGroup'] 
2945    if label: 
2946      group.append({'Label': label}) 
2947    num_configurations = len(spec['configurations']) 
2948    def GetEdges(node): 
2949      # Use a definition of edges such that user_of_variable -> used_varible. 
2950      # This happens to be easier in this case, since a variable's 
2951      # definition contains all variables it references in a single string. 
2952      edges = set() 
2953      for value in sorted(properties[node].keys()): 
2954        # Add to edges all $(...) references to variables. 
2955        # 
2956        # Variable references that refer to names not in properties are excluded 
2957        # These can exist for instance to refer built in definitions like 
2958        # $(SolutionDir). 
2959        # 
2960        # Self references are ignored. Self reference is used in a few places to 
2961        # append to the default value. I.e. PATH=$(PATH);other_path 
2962        edges.update(set([v for v in MSVS_VARIABLE_REFERENCE.findall(value) 
2963                          if v in properties and v != node])) 
2964      return edges 

2965    properties_ordered = gyp.common.TopologicallySorted( 
2966        properties.keys(), GetEdges) 
2967    # Walk properties in the reverse of a topological sort on 
2968    # user_of_variable -> used_variable as this ensures variables are 
2969    # defined before they are used. 
2970    # NOTE: reverse(topsort(DAG)) = topsort(reverse_edges(DAG)) 
2971    for name in reversed(properties_ordered): 
2972      values = properties[name] 
2973      for value, conditions in sorted(values.iteritems()): 
2974        if len(conditions) == num_configurations: 
2975          # If the value is the same all configurations, 
2976          # just add one unconditional entry. 
2977          group.append([name, value]) 
2978        else: 
2979          for condition in conditions: 
2980            group.append([name, {'Condition': condition}, value]) 
2981    return [group] 
2982   
2983   

2984 -def _GetMSBuildToolSettingsSections(spec, configurations): 

2985    groups = [] 
2986    for (name, configuration) in sorted(configurations.iteritems()): 
2987      msbuild_settings = configuration['finalized_msbuild_settings'] 
2988      group = ['ItemDefinitionGroup', 
2989               {'Condition': _GetConfigurationCondition(name, configuration)} 
2990              ] 
2991      for tool_name, tool_settings in sorted(msbuild_settings.iteritems()): 
2992        # Skip the tool named '' which is a holder of global settings handled 
2993        # by _GetMSBuildConfigurationGlobalProperties. 
2994        if tool_name: 
2995          if tool_settings: 
2996            tool = [tool_name] 
2997            for name, value in sorted(tool_settings.iteritems()): 
2998              formatted_value = _GetValueFormattedForMSBuild(tool_name, name, 
2999                                                             value) 
3000              tool.append([name, formatted_value]) 
3001            group.append(tool) 
3002      groups.append(group) 
3003    return groups 

3004   
3005   

3006 -def _FinalizeMSBuildSettings(spec, configuration): 

3007    if 'msbuild_settings' in configuration: 
3008      converted = False 
3009      msbuild_settings = configuration['msbuild_settings'] 
3010      MSVSSettings.ValidateMSBuildSettings(msbuild_settings) 
3011    else: 
3012      converted = True 
3013      msvs_settings = configuration.get('msvs_settings', {}) 
3014      msbuild_settings = MSVSSettings.ConvertToMSBuildSettings(msvs_settings) 
3015    include_dirs, midl_include_dirs, resource_include_dirs = \ 
3016        _GetIncludeDirs(configuration) 
3017    libraries = _GetLibraries(spec) 
3018    library_dirs = _GetLibraryDirs(configuration) 
3019    out_file, _, msbuild_tool = _GetOutputFilePathAndTool(spec, msbuild=True) 
3020    target_ext = _GetOutputTargetExt(spec) 
3021    defines = _GetDefines(configuration) 
3022    if converted: 
3023      # Visual Studio 2010 has TR1 
3024      defines = [d for d in defines if d != '_HAS_TR1=0'] 
3025      # Warn of ignored settings 
3026      ignored_settings = ['msvs_tool_files'] 
3027      for ignored_setting in ignored_settings: 
3028        value = configuration.get(ignored_setting) 
3029        if value: 
3030          print ('Warning: The automatic conversion to MSBuild does not handle ' 
3031                 '%s.  Ignoring setting of %s' % (ignored_setting, str(value))) 
3032   
3033    defines = [_EscapeCppDefineForMSBuild(d) for d in defines] 
3034    disabled_warnings = _GetDisabledWarnings(configuration) 
3035    prebuild = configuration.get('msvs_prebuild') 
3036    postbuild = configuration.get('msvs_postbuild') 
3037    def_file = _GetModuleDefinition(spec) 
3038    precompiled_header = configuration.get('msvs_precompiled_header') 
3039   
3040    # Add the information to the appropriate tool 
3041    # TODO(jeanluc) We could optimize and generate these settings only if 
3042    # the corresponding files are found, e.g. don't generate ResourceCompile 
3043    # if you don't have any resources. 
3044    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 
3045                'AdditionalIncludeDirectories', include_dirs) 
3046    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'Midl', 
3047                'AdditionalIncludeDirectories', midl_include_dirs) 
3048    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ResourceCompile', 
3049                'AdditionalIncludeDirectories', resource_include_dirs) 
3050    # Add in libraries, note that even for empty libraries, we want this 
3051    # set, to prevent inheriting default libraries from the enviroment. 
3052    _ToolSetOrAppend(msbuild_settings, 'Link', 'AdditionalDependencies', 
3053                    libraries) 
3054    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'Link', 'AdditionalLibraryDirectories', 
3055                library_dirs) 
3056    if out_file: 
3057      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, msbuild_tool, 'OutputFile', out_file, 
3058                  only_if_unset=True) 
3059    if target_ext: 
3060      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, msbuild_tool, 'TargetExt', target_ext, 
3061                  only_if_unset=True) 
3062    # Add defines. 
3063    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 
3064                'PreprocessorDefinitions', defines) 
3065    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ResourceCompile', 
3066                'PreprocessorDefinitions', defines) 
3067    # Add disabled warnings. 
3068    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 
3069                'DisableSpecificWarnings', disabled_warnings) 
3070    # Turn on precompiled headers if appropriate. 
3071    if precompiled_header: 
3072      precompiled_header = os.path.split(precompiled_header)[1] 
3073      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 'PrecompiledHeader', 'Use') 
3074      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 
3075                  'PrecompiledHeaderFile', precompiled_header) 
3076      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 
3077                  'ForcedIncludeFiles', [precompiled_header]) 
3078    else: 
3079      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 'PrecompiledHeader', 'NotUsing') 
3080    # Turn off WinRT compilation 
3081    _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'ClCompile', 'CompileAsWinRT', 'false') 
3082    # Turn on import libraries if appropriate 
3083    if spec.get('msvs_requires_importlibrary'): 
3084     _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, '', 'IgnoreImportLibrary', 'false') 
3085    # Loadable modules don't generate import libraries; 
3086    # tell dependent projects to not expect one. 
3087    if spec['type'] == 'loadable_module': 
3088      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, '', 'IgnoreImportLibrary', 'true') 
3089    # Set the module definition file if any. 
3090    if def_file: 
3091      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'Link', 'ModuleDefinitionFile', def_file) 
3092    configuration['finalized_msbuild_settings'] = msbuild_settings 
3093    if prebuild: 
3094      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'PreBuildEvent', 'Command', prebuild) 
3095    if postbuild: 
3096      _ToolAppend(msbuild_settings, 'PostBuildEvent', 'Command', postbuild) 

3097   
3098   

3099 -def _GetValueFormattedForMSBuild(tool_name, name, value): 

3100    if type(value) == list: 
3101      # For some settings, VS2010 does not automatically extends the settings 
3102      # TODO(jeanluc) Is this what we want? 
3103      if name in ['AdditionalIncludeDirectories', 
3104                  'AdditionalLibraryDirectories', 
3105                  'AdditionalOptions', 
3106                  'DelayLoadDLLs', 
3107                  'DisableSpecificWarnings', 
3108                  'PreprocessorDefinitions']: 
3109        value.append('%%(%s)' % name) 
3110      # For most tools, entries in a list should be separated with ';' but some 
3111      # settings use a space.  Check for those first. 
3112      exceptions = { 
3113          'ClCompile': ['AdditionalOptions'], 
3114          'Link': ['AdditionalOptions'], 
3115          'Lib': ['AdditionalOptions']} 
3116      if tool_name in exceptions and name in exceptions[tool_name]: 
3117        char = ' ' 
3118      else: 
3119        char = ';' 
3120      formatted_value = char.join( 
3121          [MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(i) for i in value]) 
3122    else: 
3123      formatted_value = MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(value) 
3124    return formatted_value 

3125   
3126   

3127 -def _VerifySourcesExist(sources, root_dir): 

3128    """Verifies that all source files exist on disk. 
3129   
3130    Checks that all regular source files, i.e. not created at run time, 
3131    exist on disk.  Missing files cause needless recompilation but no otherwise 
3132    visible errors. 
3133   
3134    Arguments: 
3135      sources: A recursive list of Filter/file names. 
3136      root_dir: The root directory for the relative path names. 
3137    Returns: 
3138      A list of source files that cannot be found on disk. 
3139    """ 
3140    missing_sources = [] 
3141    for source in sources: 
3142      if isinstance(source, MSVSProject.Filter): 
3143        missing_sources.extend(_VerifySourcesExist(source.contents, root_dir)) 
3144      else: 
3145        if '$' not in source: 
3146          full_path = os.path.join(root_dir, source) 
3147          if not os.path.exists(full_path): 
3148            missing_sources.append(full_path) 
3149    return missing_sources 

3150   
3151   

3152 -def _GetMSBuildSources(spec, sources, exclusions, rule_dependencies, 
3153                         extension_to_rule_name, actions_spec, 
3154                         sources_handled_by_action, list_excluded): 

3155    groups = ['none', 'masm', 'midl', 'include', 'compile', 'resource', 'rule', 
3156              'rule_dependency'] 
3157    grouped_sources = {} 
3158    for g in groups: 
3159      grouped_sources[g] = [] 
3160   
3161    _AddSources2(spec, sources, exclusions, grouped_sources, 
3162                 rule_dependencies, extension_to_rule_name, 
3163                 sources_handled_by_action, list_excluded) 
3164    sources = [] 
3165    for g in groups: 
3166      if grouped_sources[g]: 
3167        sources.append(['ItemGroup'] + grouped_sources[g]) 
3168    if actions_spec: 
3169      sources.append(['ItemGroup'] + actions_spec) 
3170    return sources 

3171   
3172   

3173 -def _AddSources2(spec, sources, exclusions, grouped_sources, 
3174                   rule_dependencies, extension_to_rule_name, 
3175                   sources_handled_by_action, 
3176                   list_excluded): 

3177    extensions_excluded_from_precompile = [] 
3178    for source in sources: 
3179      if isinstance(source, MSVSProject.Filter): 
3180        _AddSources2(spec, source.contents, exclusions, grouped_sources, 
3181                     rule_dependencies, extension_to_rule_name, 
3182                     sources_handled_by_action, 
3183                     list_excluded) 
3184      else: 
3185        if not source in sources_handled_by_action: 
3186          detail = [] 
3187          excluded_configurations = exclusions.get(source, []) 
3188          if len(excluded_configurations) == len(spec['configurations']): 
3189            detail.append(['ExcludedFromBuild', 'true']) 
3190          else: 
3191            for config_name, configuration in sorted(excluded_configurations): 
3192              condition = _GetConfigurationCondition(config_name, configuration) 
3193              detail.append(['ExcludedFromBuild', 
3194                             {'Condition': condition}, 
3195                             'true']) 
3196          # Add precompile if needed 
3197          for config_name, configuration in spec['configurations'].iteritems(): 
3198            precompiled_source = configuration.get('msvs_precompiled_source', '') 
3199            if precompiled_source != '': 
3200              precompiled_source = _FixPath(precompiled_source) 
3201              if not extensions_excluded_from_precompile: 
3202                # If the precompiled header is generated by a C source, we must 
3203                # not try to use it for C++ sources, and vice versa. 
3204                basename, extension = os.path.splitext(precompiled_source) 
3205                if extension == '.c': 
3206                  extensions_excluded_from_precompile = ['.cc', '.cpp', '.cxx'] 
3207                else: 
3208                  extensions_excluded_from_precompile = ['.c'] 
3209   
3210            if precompiled_source == source: 
3211              condition = _GetConfigurationCondition(config_name, configuration) 
3212              detail.append(['PrecompiledHeader', 
3213                             {'Condition': condition}, 
3214                             'Create' 
3215                            ]) 
3216            else: 
3217              # Turn off precompiled header usage for source files of a 
3218              # different type than the file that generated the 
3219              # precompiled header. 
3220              for extension in extensions_excluded_from_precompile: 
3221                if source.endswith(extension): 
3222                  detail.append(['PrecompiledHeader', '']) 
3223                  detail.append(['ForcedIncludeFiles', '']) 
3224   
3225          group, element = _MapFileToMsBuildSourceType(source, rule_dependencies, 
3226                                                       extension_to_rule_name) 
3227          grouped_sources[group].append([element, {'Include': source}] + detail) 

3228   
3229   

3230 -def _GetMSBuildProjectReferences(project): 

3231    references = [] 
3232    if project.dependencies: 
3233      group = ['ItemGroup'] 
3234      for dependency in project.dependencies: 
3235        guid = dependency.guid 
3236        project_dir = os.path.split(project.path)[0] 
3237        relative_path = gyp.common.RelativePath(dependency.path, project_dir) 
3238        project_ref = ['ProjectReference', 
3239            {'Include': relative_path}, 
3240            ['Project', guid], 
3241            ['ReferenceOutputAssembly', 'false'] 
3242            ] 
3243        for config in dependency.spec.get('configurations', {}).itervalues(): 
3244          if config.get('msvs_use_library_dependency_inputs', 0): 
3245            project_ref.append(['UseLibraryDependencyInputs', 'true']) 
3246            break 
3247          # If it's disabled in any config, turn it off in the reference. 
3248          if config.get('msvs_2010_disable_uldi_when_referenced', 0): 
3249            project_ref.append(['UseLibraryDependencyInputs', 'false']) 
3250            break 
3251        group.append(project_ref) 
3252      references.append(group) 
3253    return references 

3254   
3255   

3256 -def _GenerateMSBuildProject(project, options, version, generator_flags): 

3257    spec = project.spec 
3258    configurations = spec['configurations'] 
3259    project_dir, project_file_name = os.path.split(project.path) 
3260    gyp.common.EnsureDirExists(project.path) 
3261    # Prepare list of sources and excluded sources. 
3262    gyp_path = _NormalizedSource(project.build_file) 
3263    relative_path_of_gyp_file = gyp.common.RelativePath(gyp_path, project_dir) 
3264   
3265    gyp_file = os.path.split(project.build_file)[1] 
3266    sources, excluded_sources = _PrepareListOfSources(spec, generator_flags, 
3267                                                      gyp_file) 
3268    # Add rules. 
3269    actions_to_add = {} 
3270    props_files_of_rules = set() 
3271    targets_files_of_rules = set() 
3272    rule_dependencies = set() 
3273    extension_to_rule_name = {} 
3274    list_excluded = generator_flags.get('msvs_list_excluded_files', True) 
3275   
3276    # Don't generate rules if we are using an external builder like ninja. 
3277    if not spec.get('msvs_external_builder'): 
3278      _GenerateRulesForMSBuild(project_dir, options, spec, 
3279                               sources, excluded_sources, 
3280                               props_files_of_rules, targets_files_of_rules, 
3281                               actions_to_add, rule_dependencies, 
3282                               extension_to_rule_name) 
3283    else: 
3284      rules = spec.get('rules', []) 
3285      _AdjustSourcesForRules(rules, sources, excluded_sources, True) 
3286   
3287    sources, excluded_sources, excluded_idl = ( 
3288        _AdjustSourcesAndConvertToFilterHierarchy(spec, options, 
3289                                                  project_dir, sources, 
3290                                                  excluded_sources, 
3291                                                  list_excluded, version)) 
3292   
3293    # Don't add actions if we are using an external builder like ninja. 
3294    if not spec.get('msvs_external_builder'): 
3295      _AddActions(actions_to_add, spec, project.build_file) 
3296      _AddCopies(actions_to_add, spec) 
3297   
3298      # NOTE: this stanza must appear after all actions have been decided. 
3299      # Don't excluded sources with actions attached, or they won't run. 
3300      excluded_sources = _FilterActionsFromExcluded( 
3301          excluded_sources, actions_to_add) 
3302   
3303    exclusions = _GetExcludedFilesFromBuild(spec, excluded_sources, excluded_idl) 
3304    actions_spec, sources_handled_by_action = _GenerateActionsForMSBuild( 
3305        spec, actions_to_add) 
3306   
3307    _GenerateMSBuildFiltersFile(project.path + '.filters', sources, 
3308                                rule_dependencies, 
3309                                extension_to_rule_name) 
3310    missing_sources = _VerifySourcesExist(sources, project_dir) 
3311   
3312    for configuration in configurations.itervalues(): 
3313      _FinalizeMSBuildSettings(spec, configuration) 
3314   
3315    # Add attributes to root element 
3316   
3317    import_default_section = [ 
3318        ['Import', {'Project': r'$(VCTargetsPath)\Microsoft.Cpp.Default.props'}]] 
3319    import_cpp_props_section = [ 
3320        ['Import', {'Project': r'$(VCTargetsPath)\Microsoft.Cpp.props'}]] 
3321    import_cpp_targets_section = [ 
3322        ['Import', {'Project': r'$(VCTargetsPath)\Microsoft.Cpp.targets'}]] 
3323    import_masm_props_section = [ 
3324        ['Import', 
3325          {'Project': r'$(VCTargetsPath)\BuildCustomizations\masm.props'}]] 
3326    import_masm_targets_section = [ 
3327        ['Import', 
3328          {'Project': r'$(VCTargetsPath)\BuildCustomizations\masm.targets'}]] 
3329    macro_section = [['PropertyGroup', {'Label': 'UserMacros'}]] 
3330   
3331    content = [ 
3332        'Project', 
3333        {'xmlns': 'http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003', 
3334         'ToolsVersion': version.ProjectVersion(), 
3335         'DefaultTargets': 'Build' 
3336        }] 
3337   
3338    content += _GetMSBuildProjectConfigurations(configurations) 
3339    content += _GetMSBuildGlobalProperties(spec, project.guid, project_file_name) 
3340    content += import_default_section 
3341    content += _GetMSBuildConfigurationDetails(spec, project.build_file) 
3342    if spec.get('msvs_enable_winphone'): 
3343     content += _GetMSBuildLocalProperties('v120_wp81') 
3344    else: 
3345     content += _GetMSBuildLocalProperties(project.msbuild_toolset) 
3346    content += import_cpp_props_section 
3347    content += import_masm_props_section 
3348    content += _GetMSBuildExtensions(props_files_of_rules) 
3349    content += _GetMSBuildPropertySheets(configurations) 
3350    content += macro_section 
3351    content += _GetMSBuildConfigurationGlobalProperties(spec, configurations, 
3352                                                        project.build_file) 
3353    content += _GetMSBuildToolSettingsSections(spec, configurations) 
3354    content += _GetMSBuildSources( 
3355        spec, sources, exclusions, rule_dependencies, extension_to_rule_name, 
3356        actions_spec, sources_handled_by_action, list_excluded) 
3357    content += _GetMSBuildProjectReferences(project) 
3358    content += import_cpp_targets_section 
3359    content += import_masm_targets_section 
3360    content += _GetMSBuildExtensionTargets(targets_files_of_rules) 
3361   
3362    if spec.get('msvs_external_builder'): 
3363      content += _GetMSBuildExternalBuilderTargets(spec) 
3364   
3365    # TODO(jeanluc) File a bug to get rid of runas.  We had in MSVS: 
3366    # has_run_as = _WriteMSVSUserFile(project.path, version, spec) 
3367   
3368    easy_xml.WriteXmlIfChanged(content, project.path, pretty=True, win32=True) 
3369   
3370    return missing_sources 

3371   
3372   

3373 -def _GetMSBuildExternalBuilderTargets(spec): 

3374    """Return a list of MSBuild targets for external builders. 
3375   
3376    The "Build" and "Clean" targets are always generated.  If the spec contains 
3377    'msvs_external_builder_clcompile_cmd', then the "ClCompile" target will also 
3378    be generated, to support building selected C/C++ files. 
3379   
3380    Arguments: 
3381      spec: The gyp target spec. 
3382    Returns: 
3383      List of MSBuild 'Target' specs. 
3384    """ 
3385    build_cmd = _BuildCommandLineForRuleRaw( 
3386        spec, spec['msvs_external_builder_build_cmd'], 
3387        False, False, False, False) 
3388    build_target = ['Target', {'Name': 'Build'}] 
3389    build_target.append(['Exec', {'Command': build_cmd}]) 
3390   
3391    clean_cmd = _BuildCommandLineForRuleRaw( 
3392        spec, spec['msvs_external_builder_clean_cmd'], 
3393        False, False, False, False) 
3394    clean_target = ['Target', {'Name': 'Clean'}] 
3395    clean_target.append(['Exec', {'Command': clean_cmd}]) 
3396   
3397    targets = [build_target, clean_target] 
3398   
3399    if spec.get('msvs_external_builder_clcompile_cmd'): 
3400      clcompile_cmd = _BuildCommandLineForRuleRaw( 
3401          spec, spec['msvs_external_builder_clcompile_cmd'], 
3402          False, False, False, False) 
3403      clcompile_target = ['Target', {'Name': 'ClCompile'}] 
3404      clcompile_target.append(['Exec', {'Command': clcompile_cmd}]) 
3405      targets.append(clcompile_target) 
3406   
3407    return targets 

3408   
3409   

3410 -def _GetMSBuildExtensions(props_files_of_rules): 

3411    extensions = ['ImportGroup', {'Label': 'ExtensionSettings'}] 
3412    for props_file in props_files_of_rules: 
3413      extensions.append(['Import', {'Project': props_file}]) 
3414    return [extensions] 

3415   
3416   

3417 -def _GetMSBuildExtensionTargets(targets_files_of_rules): 

3418    targets_node = ['ImportGroup', {'Label': 'ExtensionTargets'}] 
3419    for targets_file in sorted(targets_files_of_rules): 
3420      targets_node.append(['Import', {'Project': targets_file}]) 
3421    return [targets_node] 

3422   
3423   

3424 -def _GenerateActionsForMSBuild(spec, actions_to_add): 

3425    """Add actions accumulated into an actions_to_add, merging as needed. 
3426   
3427    Arguments: 
3428      spec: the target project dict 
3429      actions_to_add: dictionary keyed on input name, which maps to a list of 
3430          dicts describing the actions attached to that input file. 
3431   
3432    Returns: 
3433      A pair of (action specification, the sources handled by this action). 
3434    """ 
3435    sources_handled_by_action = OrderedSet() 
3436    actions_spec = [] 
3437    for primary_input, actions in actions_to_add.iteritems(): 
3438      inputs = OrderedSet() 
3439      outputs = OrderedSet() 
3440      descriptions = [] 
3441      commands = [] 
3442      for action in actions: 
3443        inputs.update(OrderedSet(action['inputs'])) 
3444        outputs.update(OrderedSet(action['outputs'])) 
3445        descriptions.append(action['description']) 
3446        cmd = action['command'] 
3447        # For most actions, add 'call' so that actions that invoke batch files 
3448        # return and continue executing.  msbuild_use_call provides a way to 
3449        # disable this but I have not seen any adverse effect from doing that 
3450        # for everything. 
3451        if action.get('msbuild_use_call', True): 
3452          cmd = 'call ' + cmd 
3453        commands.append(cmd) 
3454      # Add the custom build action for one input file. 
3455      description = ', and also '.join(descriptions) 
3456   
3457      # We can't join the commands simply with && because the command line will 
3458      # get too long. See also _AddActions: cygwin's setup_env mustn't be called 
3459      # for every invocation or the command that sets the PATH will grow too 
3460      # long. 
3461      command = '\r\n'.join([c + '\r\nif %errorlevel% neq 0 exit /b %errorlevel%' 
3462                             for c in commands]) 
3463      _AddMSBuildAction(spec, 
3464                        primary_input, 
3465                        inputs, 
3466                        outputs, 
3467                        command, 
3468                        description, 
3469                        sources_handled_by_action, 
3470                        actions_spec) 
3471    return actions_spec, sources_handled_by_action 

3472   
3473   

3474 -def _AddMSBuildAction(spec, primary_input, inputs, outputs, cmd, description, 
3475                        sources_handled_by_action, actions_spec): 

3476    command = MSVSSettings.ConvertVCMacrosToMSBuild(cmd) 
3477    primary_input = _FixPath(primary_input) 
3478    inputs_array = _FixPaths(inputs) 
3479    outputs_array = _FixPaths(outputs) 
3480    additional_inputs = ';'.join([i for i in inputs_array 
3481                                  if i != primary_input]) 
3482    outputs = ';'.join(outputs_array) 
3483    sources_handled_by_action.add(primary_input) 
3484    action_spec = ['CustomBuild', {'Include': primary_input}] 
3485    action_spec.extend( 
3486        # TODO(jeanluc) 'Document' for all or just if as_sources? 
3487        [['FileType', 'Document'], 
3488         ['Command', command], 
3489         ['Message', description], 
3490         ['Outputs', outputs] 
3491        ]) 
3492    if additional_inputs: 
3493      action_spec.append(['AdditionalInputs', additional_inputs]) 
3494    actions_spec.append(action_spec) 

3495

   Trees       Indices       Help   
V-For-Water
